root.sql: select sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control)as group_control_name , count(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)as c_mem from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where 1=1 and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' group by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control
